---
title: "project_name"
author: "author_name"
---

## About

Research website for **project_name**. Use the navigation above to explore progress
updates, presentations, and publications.

## Sections

- [**Progress**](progress/index.qmd) — Research updates, figures, and analyses
- [**Presentations**](presentations/index.qmd) — Conference talks and seminar slides
- [**Papers**](papers/index.qmd) — Journal articles and preprints
- [**Abstracts**](abstracts/index.qmd) — Conference abstracts and extended abstracts
